harness: tools/selector_v2_smoke_v1.py (the smoke harness; default off, parametrized --modes/--out)
logging_flow: test_agent -> SH.selector_trace(obs, baseline) -> _LOG records; run_chunk tags each record with game_result after the game; metrics counters per (mode,opponent).

fields.game_id: f"{mode_key}:{opp_name}:t{tidx}:{i}" where tidx is a GLOBALLY UNIQUE per-task index -> unique per game
fields.seat: t_seat=(seat0+i)%2 alternates; test agent at seat t_seat
fields.first_changed: set True on the FIRST override per game (via _CTX first_changed_done), False thereafter and on blocked rows
fields.blocked_decision_logging: terminal overrides that are blocked keep baseline AND are logged as rows with blocked_terminal=True + blocked_override_reason
fields.veto_logging: metrics.veto incremented when hard_veto on a logged record
fields.outcome_linkage: rec.game_result set per game (win/loss/draw) after env.run

fixes_since_v2_smoke.game_id_non_unique: FIXED -- was "{mode}:{opp}:{seat0}:{i}" colliding across chunks (24 distinct for 360 games); now uses globally-unique tidx
fixes_since_v2_smoke.blocked_decisions_unlogged: FIXED -- blocked terminals were counters only; now logged as rows with outcome linkage
fixes_since_v2_smoke.first_changed_outcomes_miskeyed: FIXED in the diagnostic (iterated mode-keys vs mode-values)

validated_by: tools/validate_smoke_trace_v1.py on the micro-smoke -> ALL 8 checks PASS
